description: A clear alignment point should produce a durable decision payload.

payload.meetingNotes: Capture release path decisions and owner assignments.
payload.focusSummary: The team explicitly decided to separate the rollback checklist from the feature release.

focusAreas.summary: Separate rollback readiness from feature deployment
focusAreas.detail: The group wants a smaller release surface and a standalone rollback checklist before the feature resumes.
evidence: Avery: Let us split rollback readiness into its own gate before we continue.
